name: vault
description: The knowledge-vault skill: capture knowledge and tasks into a personal LLM wiki and query the compiled notes, through the vault's MCP connector.

mcp_url.title: Knowledge vault MCP URL
mcp_url.description: Your self-hosted knowledge-vault MCP connector endpoint, including the /mcp path (e.g. https://knowledge.example.com/mcp). The skill drives the vault through this server; OAuth is negotiated automatically on first connect.

oauth_client_id.title: OAuth client ID (only for IdPs without dynamic client registration)
oauth_client_id.description: Leave blank if your auth proxy supports dynamic client registration (e.g. Cloudflare Access Managed OAuth) — Claude Code registers itself automatically. Set it to a pre-registered public/PKCE client ID only when your IdP has no DCR (e.g. self-hosted Authelia): that client must register the loopback redirect http://127.0.0.1:47832/callback (and/or http://localhost:47832/callback) to match the fixed callback port below.
